TRAINER: Rebecca Bueno, Fit & Fierce Bounce PH
DESCRIPTION:
Bounce your way to fitness with Fit & Fierce Bounce PH!

Experience the ultimate rebounding workout that combines fun, energy, and incredible results. We are the first in the Philippines to incorporate specialized FitBoots into our classes, taking your bouncing experience to the next level.

Our dynamic routines, led by passionate instructors, will have you jumping, twisting, and grooving to the beat, all while strengthening your muscles, improving your balance, and boosting your cardio fitness. The supportive FitBoots enhance stability and reduce impact on your joints, ensuring a safe and enjoyable workout for everyone.   

Whether you're a fitness enthusiast or just starting your journey, Fit & Fierce Bounce PH offers a welcoming and inclusive environment where you can achieve your goals and have a blast doing it. Get ready to feel the burn, boost your mood, and unleash your inner fierceness!

DESCRIPTION:
Get fit and have fun with MixxedFit!

This exhilarating dance fitness program combines explosive moves with body toning for a full-body workout. Torch calories, improve coordination, boost your mood, and feel empowered, all while dancing to your favorite tunes. Suitable for all fitness levels, MixxedFit is the perfect way to get in shape and unleash your inner dancer!

Benefits of MixxedFit:

Full-body workout: Engage every muscle in your body, from head to toe, for a comprehensive and effective workout.

Cardiovascular boost: Elevate your heart rate and improve your endurance, helping you torch calories and achieve your fitness goals.

Improved coordination and balance: Master complex dance moves and sequences, enhancing your agility and grace.

Stress relief: Dance your worries away, release endorphins, and boost your mood for a happier and healthier you.

Fun and engaging: Say goodbye to boring workouts! MixxedFit's energetic atmosphere and infectious music will keep you coming back for more.

Suitable for all fitness levels: Whether you're a seasoned dancer or just starting out, MixxedFit offers modifications and challenges to cater to everyone.

Join the MixxedFit community today and discover the joy of dance fitness!

Unleash your inner islander with our exhilarating dance workout! Get fit while grooving to the hottest Polynesian and island-inspired beats. Our energetic classes blend Tahitian, Hawaiian, and contemporary dance moves for a full-body workout that's fun, effective, and accessible to all levels. Experience the vibrant spirit of the islands and dance your way to a healthier, happier you!

Instead of listening to music, you become the music in this exhilarating full-body workout that combines cardio, conditioning, and strength training with yoga and pilates-inspired movements. Using Ripstix, lightly weighted drumsticks engineered specifically for exercising, POUND transforms drumming into an incredibly effective way of working out.

Designed for all fitness levels, POUND provides the perfect atmosphere for letting loose, getting energized, toning up and rockin' out! The workout is easily modifiable and the alternative vibe and welcoming philosophy appeals to rockstars of all ages and abilities.
OTHER COSTS: P500 Transportation for other areas than Makati/BGC

DESCRIPTION:
POUND Unplugged is a 30-minute class that balances focused, high- Intensity movements with restorative stretches, rhythmic breathing and meditation.

Using Ripstix, exercise drumsticks, the workout guides participants through a deeply intentional, rhythmic journey designed to promote the health and fitness of the whole person mental, physical, and emotional.

Quick, efficient, and challenging, POUND Unplugged connects mind, body, and sound to create immersive, sensory experiences, unlike anything you've experienced in a group fitness class.

GENERATION POUND is a youth-oriented program that fuses movement and music to improve focus, coordination, physical fitness and teamwork skills. Kids ages 6-12 ("Rockstars in Training) will learn alternative ways to explore movement, embrace their creativity and ROCK OUT ultimately building strength, confidence and self- awareness.

The power of Generation POUND encompasses more than just physical fitness. Combining kid-friendly choreography and group activities, it promotes social and emotional well-being by fostering relationships, building self-esteem and self-awareness, and inspiring the next generation of happy, healthy kids.®

Revolutionize your workout with our cutting-edge Electrical Muscle Stimulation (EMS) technology! Experience a full-body workout in just 20 minutes, equivalent to hours at the gym. Our personalized training sessions target multiple muscle groups simultaneously, maximizing your results and saving you time. Whether you're looking to build strength, lose weight, or improve overall fitness, our EMS technology can help you achieve your goals faster and more efficiently.

DESCRIPTION: Finger Holds Meditation, is a Japanese practice that involves holding each finger to balance emotional and physical health. Each finger is associated with specific emotions and organ systems. The practice is believed to help release stress and restore harmony in the body.

CLASS / SESSION: The Science of Reiki: Enhancing Wellness and Performance through Natural Healing
DESCRIPTION: The Science of Reiki: Enhancing Wellness and Performance through Natural Healing explores the intersection of ancient healing practices and modern science. This enlightening talk delves into the scientific principles behind Reiki, demonstrating how it can enhance overall wellness and improve performance. Attendees will learn about the physiological and psychological benefits of Reiki, supported by research and case studies. The discussion will also cover practical applications and techniques for integrating Reiki into daily life for stress reduction, energy balancing, and enhanced mental clarity.

A Tibetan Singing Bowls Sound Bath is a meditative experience where participants are immersed in the soothing sounds and vibrations of Tibetan singing bowls. These bowls, made from a blend of metals, produce harmonious tones that promote deep relaxation, reduce stress, and enhance meditation. The sound bath helps balance the body's energy centers, supporting both physical and emotional healing.

Agewell Pilates: Age Gracefully, Move Joyfully

Specifically designed for older adults facing lifestyle changes, Agewell Pilates helps rebuild strength, improve balance and mobility, and boost confidence. Our gentle yet effective program is tailored to your needs, addressing the risks of falls, injuries, and loss of independence.

Rediscover the joy of movement, improve your quality of life, and age gracefully with Agewell Pilates.

Functional Training for Active Aging: Age Strong, Live Well.

Embrace a vibrant and fulfilling lifestyle with Functional Training for Active Aging. Our specialized program focuses on enhancing your everyday movements, helping you maintain independence and enjoy an active life.

Through carefully designed exercises, we target strength, balance, coordination, and flexibility – essential elements for navigating daily tasks with ease and confidence. Whether it's carrying groceries, climbing stairs, or playing with grandchildren, our training empowers you to move freely and actively.

Join us and experience the transformative power of functional fitness, tailored specifically for older adults. Age strong, live well.

Mobility Training: Move with Ease, Live without Limits.

Whether you're an athlete seeking peak performance, an older adult looking to maintain independence, or simply someone wanting to feel better in their body, Mobility Training can help. Through targeted exercises, we'll improve your flexibility, range of motion, and overall physical function.

Reduce pain, improve posture, and unlock your full potential. Experience the freedom of movement and live life to the fullest with Mobility Training.

Foam Rolling: Unleash Your Body's Potential

Whether you're an athlete seeking peak performance, someone struggling with muscle pain, or simply looking to prioritize self-care, foam rolling is your key to feeling and moving better.

Through targeted self-massage, foam rolling helps:

Reduce muscle soreness and tension
Improve flexibility and range of motion
Enhance recovery after workouts
Boost circulation
Prevent injuries
Roll away the stress, unlock your full potential, and experience the transformative power of foam rolling.

CLASS / SESSION: Pilates Sculpt: Mat, Reformer, Chair, Cadillac, Barrel
DESCRIPTION:
Pilates: Sculpt, Strengthen, and Transform

Experience the full spectrum of Pilates exercise with our comprehensive program. From foundational mat work to the dynamic challenges of the Reformer, Chair, Cadillac, and Barrel, our classes cater to all levels and goals.

Build core strength, improve posture, increase flexibility, and cultivate a sense of mindful movement as you sculpt a stronger, more balanced you.

CLASS / SESSION: Pilates: BOSU, Stabily Ball, Foam Roller
DESCRIPTION: Pilates: Reimagine Your Workout, Redefine Your Body. Take your Pilates practice to new heights with the BOSU, Stability Ball, and Foam Roller. Deepen your core engagement, improve stability, release muscle tension, and experience a full-body transformation. Challenge yourself, have fun, & achieve a stronger, more balanced you!

Athletic Pilates: Power Up Your Performance

Elevate your athleticism and unlock your full potential with Athletic Pilates. This dynamic program blends traditional Pilates principles with sports-specific movements, challenging your strength, flexibility, and coordination to enhance your performance in any sport or activity.

Whether you're a seasoned athlete or a weekend warrior, Athletic Pilates will:

Build a strong core and improve overall stability
Increase power and agility
Enhance flexibility and range of motion
Improve body awareness and control
Prevent injuries and aid in rehabilitation
Experience the difference Athletic Pilates can make in your game. Take your training to the next level and unleash your inner athlete!

Prenatal & Postnatal Pilates: Nurture Your Body, Empower Your Journey

Experience the transformative power of Pilates during pregnancy and postpartum. Our specialized classes provide a safe and supportive environment to help you maintain strength, flexibility, and core connection throughout your motherhood journey.

Prenatal Pilates: Prepare your body for childbirth, ease pregnancy discomfort, and improve posture.
Postnatal Pilates: Rebuild core strength, regain pelvic floor function, and safely return to exercise after childbirth.
Our certified instructors guide you through gentle yet effective exercises, tailored to your individual needs and stage of pregnancy or postpartum recovery. Embrace mindful movement, build confidence, and nurture your body as you embark on this incredible chapter of your life.
